content.body:
Adds TelemetryConfig struct (Enabled *bool, Path string) to Config,
plus TelemetryEnabled() helper that returns true when Enabled is nil
(absence == enabled). Includes round-trip and default tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(config): add TelemetryConfig with default-on Enabled bool pointer
